title: Zoto Spec System Aggregate Spec Status
description: Canonical JSON/YAML payload for spec-root live status (paired with a block-marked `.status.md`). Event history is capped at 100 entries; the yml is authoritative — see `docs/status-schema.md`.

schema_version.description: Schema revision for this document. Bump only when breaking the aggregate status contract.

phase.description: Current execution phase from the spec manifest; `0` when not yet started.

aggregate_state.description: Rolled-up state across all subtasks after aggregator rules.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when spec execution began, if known.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last aggregate status write.

aggregate_progress.description: Counts of subtasks in each state.

subtasks.description: One entry per `status/*.status.yml` file the aggregator last scanned.

subtask_id.description: Matches the subtask id in the paired status document.

status_path.description: Repo-relative path to the authoritative yml for this subtask (e.g. `specs/.../status/subtask-01....yml`).

last_heartbeat.description: Most recent heartbeat from the subtask yml, or null if never reported.

blockers.description: Derived list when any subtask is `blocked` or `failed`.

definition_of_done_status.description: Mirrors Definition of Done lines from the spec index for rollup display.

config_reloaded.description: Append-only audit of times the live config loader observed a new mtime.

mtime.description: Filesystem mtime of the config file at observation time (ISO-8601-encoded).

events.description: Short audit log. Implementations MUST truncate to the most recent 100 entries.

extra.description: Escape hatch for forward-compatible fields not yet in this schema.
